name: Windows Shell Playbook
description: Use this skill when the user asks to run Windows shell commands, PowerShell commands, scripts, builds, tests, process checks, environment inspection, or command-line troubleshooting on the local Windows machine. It favors bounded commands and avoids fragile quoting patterns.

resources.description: Terminal tool smoke-test notes and PowerShell quoting guardrail from Raul's 2026-06-19 worker test.
